description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The exterior is clad in dark panels, contrasted by large, grid-style windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The front yard features a landscaped garden with flowering shrubs and a concrete walkway leading to a recessed entry door. The rear of the house includes a spacious terrace or balcony area, partially enclosed for privacy. The side elevations are mostly solid, with a few strategically placed windows and greenery along the perimeter. The overall aesthetic is clean, geometric, and contemporary, suitable for an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, dark exterior panels, large grid windows, and landscaped front and rear areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, large windows, and a landscaped garden with flowering shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, dark facade, large grid windows, and a spacious rear terrace with outdoor furniture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open terrace/balcony area, large windows, and partial view into the interior living space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with minimal windows, a side entry path, and greenery along the perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large grid windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with concrete steps, flanked by large windows and a landscaped garden
